name: Transformer
description: Attention Is All You Need paper by Vaswani et al.
significance: Foundation architecture for all modern LLMs

name: ELMo
description: Contextualized word embeddings from Allen AI
significance: Showed deep contextualized representations improve NLP tasks

name: GPT-1
significance: Established generative pre-training + fine-tuning paradigm

name: BERT
description: Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers by Google (340M params)
significance: Dominated NLU benchmarks; pre-train then fine-tune goes mainstream

name: Multilingual BERT
description: Single BERT model trained on 104 languages
significance: First massively multilingual transformer model

name: GPT-2
description: OpenAI 1.5B parameter model initially withheld from release
significance: Sparked public AI safety debate; too dangerous to release

name: RoBERTa
significance: Showed BERT was significantly undertrained

name: T5
description: Text-to-Text Transfer Transformer by Google (11B params)
significance: Unified all NLP tasks as text-to-text; explored scaling

name: DistilBERT
description: Distilled version of BERT 60% faster with 97% performance
significance: Pioneered knowledge distillation for LLMs

name: XLM-RoBERTa
description: Cross-lingual model trained on 100 languages by Meta
significance: Strong multilingual baseline; widely adopted for cross-lingual transfer

name: GPT-3
significance: Demonstrated few-shot learning; validated scaling laws

name: Scaling Laws
description: Kaplan et al. paper on neural language model scaling
significance: Empirical laws relating compute/data/params to loss

name: mT5
description: Multilingual T5 covering 101 languages by Google
significance: Extended T5 to multilingual; widely used for non-English NLP

name: Megatron-Turing NLG
description: NVIDIA and Microsoft collaboration on training large models
significance: Advanced large-scale distributed training infrastructure

name: Switch Transformer
significance: Showed MoE can scale to trillions of parameters efficiently

name: Codex
description: OpenAI code generation model powering GitHub Copilot
significance: First major commercial LLM product; AI-assisted coding

name: Gopher
significance: Comprehensive analysis of scaling across 152 tasks

name: PaLM
significance: Breakthrough reasoning; chain-of-thought prompting

name: Chinchilla
significance: Showed most LLMs are overtrained on params and undertrained on data

name: InstructGPT
significance: Pioneered RLHF for alignment; precursor to ChatGPT

name: BLOOM
description: BigScience 176B open multilingual model covering 46 languages
significance: Largest open-science multilingual LLM; community-driven

name: ChatGPT
significance: Fastest-growing consumer app ever; mainstream inflection point

name: LLaMA
significance: Catalyzed open-source LLM ecosystem

name: GPT-4
significance: Major capability jump; multimodal (text + vision)

name: Alpaca
significance: Showed cheap fine-tuning can approximate proprietary models

name: QLoRA
significance: Enabled fine-tuning 65B models on single GPU

name: Llama 2
significance: Open-weights with permissive license; shifted industry norms

name: Mistral 7B
significance: Showed small models can punch above weight class

name: Mixtral 8x7B
significance: Open MoE model competitive with GPT-3.5

name: Gemini
significance: Google's unified multimodal frontier model

name: Gemma
significance: High-quality small open models from Google

name: Claude 3
significance: Frontier model with strong multilingual and reasoning

name: Llama 3
significance: New open-weights SOTA; massive training data (15T tokens)

name: Phi-3
significance: Showed small models trained on curated data can match larger ones

name: GPT-4o
significance: Native audio/vision/text; real-time conversational AI

name: Llama 3.1
significance: Largest open-weights model; competitive with closed frontier

name: Gemma 2
significance: Strong open models; competitive at small scale

name: o1
significance: Inference-time compute scaling; new paradigm for reasoning

name: Qwen 2.5
significance: Strong multilingual open models from China

name: Gemini 2.0
description: Google next-gen multimodal with agentic capabilities
significance: Agentic AI; tool use and autonomous action

name: DeepSeek-R1
description: DeepSeek open reasoning model trained with RL
significance: Open reasoning model; showed RL-based training for reasoning

name: Claude 3.5
significance: Strong coding and reasoning; computer use capabilities

name: GPT-4.5
significance: Largest OpenAI pre-trained model; improved EQ and breadth

name: Llama 4
description: Meta Scout and Maverick MoE models
significance: Open MoE architecture; multimodal native
